2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX
22 - 24 May 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 53
Date 23 May 2026
Time 13:17
Title Infringement - Sprint Deleted Lap Times
Description Infringement - Sprint Deleted Lap Times
Enclosed CAN DOC 53 - Sprint Deleted Lap Times .pdf
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Pedro Lamy Marcel Demers

 
 
2026 CANADIAN GRAND PRIX 
22 – 24 May 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 53 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  23 May 2026 
 
        Time  13:17 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Race 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns Pit Entry, 1, 2, 8, 9 and 14. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time 
1 2 12  Kimi Antonelli Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team 12:09:42 1:18.995

4 14 11 Sergio Perez Cadillac Formula 1 Team 12:12:23 1:17.633
